blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 44°F.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
